{{Infobox character
| name = Valketh
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Valketh]] is the [[Mist Sage]] and was formerly of [[House Wylan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Valketh]] tested [[Reigan Shen]]'s aptitude and suggested he would eventually advance to [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Valketh]]'s eyes fill with dark mist.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Valketh]] is a [[Mist Sage]] with the base strength of an [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
